pages.raw_text:
The recent unionizing of the work
at Natatorium park by the Inger-
soil Amusement Co. may result in
the entire w. w. p. system being
removed from the unfair list. Sew
eral delegates to the Central Labor
Union express themselves in favor
of making the job complete if the
ban is lifted from the park. The
latter belongs to the w. w. P, but
is leased to the amusement COM
pany. In preparing for the sum-
mer's entertainment Ingersoll has
employed union linemen and car
penters and there is considerable
sentiment these unions are behind
a movement to make the park fair.
meanwhile retaining the boycott on
the street car lines.


The building trades and electrical
workers consider the park fair at
this time and the question of for
